overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail at night. The character traverses from a stone-walled path to a cliffside trail and finally into a dense dark forest under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the mountain path with swords on his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: gray stone retaining wall running alongside the right side of the path
dark silhouetted mountain peaks visible in the distance under cloudy sky
tall evergreen trees scattered on the left hillside
green grass-covered hillside sloping down from the left side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the mountain terrain
exposed gray rock formations on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow mountain trail bordered by a stone wall on the right and grassy slopes on the left. The path winds through scattered pine trees with distant mountain peaks visible under the cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside mountain path with rocky terrain

events.description: stone wall ends and path opens to reveal steep cliff drop on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the path as it curves along the cliff edge with mountains ahead

entered.detail: steep drop-off on the right side of the path with no guardrail
steep rocky hillside with loose stones on the left side
jagged gray rock formations and boulders on the left
sparse pine trees growing on the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the stone wall disappears, revealing a steep cliff drop on the right. Geralt walks along the cliff edge with rocky slopes on the left and expansive mountain views ahead, the terrain becoming more rugged and exposed.

events.description: entering dense forest area with thick tree cover on both sides of the path
ambient light decreases significantly as path goes under dense forest canopy

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking deeper into the dark forest, the path becoming narrower and enclosed by towering trees

entered.detail: thick wall of pine trees pressing close to the left side of the path
dense cluster of evergreen trees on the right side creating enclosure
thick overhead cover of tree branches blocking the sky

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a dense pine forest where the trees close in on both sides, blocking much of the sky. The path becomes darker and more enclosed as Geralt continues deeper into the woods, with only faint moonlight filtering through the canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a sheltered path into an exposed cliffside and finally into a claustrophobic forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow trail bordered by a stone wall and grassy slopes under a cloudy night sky. As the stone wall disappears, the scene opens up to reveal a steep cliff drop on the right, shifting the terrain toward a more rugged and exposed landscape with expansive mountain views. The path then narrows again as it enters a dense pine forest where the trees close in from both sides, blocking the horizon. Finally, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with only faint moonlight filtering through the thick canopy as the camera follows Geralt deeper into the woods.
